items.body_excerpt: After a year of being relegated to just the Chase Center, the California Classic is once again back in Sacramento as the NBA split the Summer League games between SacTown and the Bay. items.title: The Braves' high-water this season was 45-21 (+14). They are 7-16 since. Still have one of the better records in the majors a week before the All-Star break but a clear indication they were overachieving and obviously need some help.

items.title: Kristaps Porzingis' contract with the Golden State Warriors becomes fully guaranteed for $20 million today.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Kristaps Porzingis' contract with the Golden State Warriors becomes fully guaranteed for $20 million today.

This is a quirk of Porzingis' extension. In order for the 2027-28 season to be partially guaranteed with a July 7, 2027 guarantee date, this season had to mirror it.

items.title: Hollander POTD Ralph Sampson. Superstar at UVA would've been top pick 4 yrs in a row. Stayed 4 yrs & HOU drafted him 1st in 83. Won ROY & paired w/Hakeem to lead HOU to 86 Finals. Traded to GS in 87 but injuries wore him down early & was out of NBA by 91.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst
items.body_excerpt: Hollander POTD Ralph Sampson. Superstar at UVA would've been top pick 4 yrs in a row. Stayed 4 yrs & HOU drafted him 1st in 83. Won ROY & paired w/Hakeem to lead HOU to 86 Finals. Traded to GS in 87 but injuries wore him down early & was out of NBA by 91.

items.title: Show must go on, Jays-wise, so missing Lowry event.
items.author: Blake Murphy
items.body_excerpt:
Show must go on, Jays-wise, so missing Lowry event. 

But the undisputed GROAT, a player who taught me a ton about the sport from watching & interacting, the bridge between analytics & eye-test, king of the charge-draw, and a deeply caring teammate and culture-setter.

KLOE
